title: Planner shell
summary: 기존 Planner 경로와 하단 탭 안에서 요리 계획과 식사 기록을 분리하고, Recipe Meal 계획 동작과 과거 완제품 계획의 읽기·삭제 호환성을 보존한다.
goal: PLANNER_WEEK를 계획 전용 화면으로 유지하면서 내부 세그먼트 탐색, 화면별 상태 격리, 완료 장보기 read-only, 과거 완제품 계획의 제한된 호환 UI를 잠근다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for any stage
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, security and compatibility reviewer, five-axis reviewer, design critic, product-design-authority, implementation, Stage 3/6 and closeout; no self-approval

dependencies: meal-log-core Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1083; its runtime is the implementation predecessor
meal-log-ui #12 owns MEAL_LOG content and interaction design
legacy-product-compat #13 owns compatibility telemetry and tombstones

external_smokes: existing Planner route bottom-tab segment deep-link back and focus restoration
plan and meal-log selected-date scroll input row total and cache isolation
legacy product plan owner-only read detail and delete nondisclosure
planner nutrition endpoint and v1 decoder compatibility without new UI calls
390px 320px desktop visual accessibility and product-design-authority evidence

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/planner-shell.test.tsx tests/planner-shell-history.test.tsx tests/planner-shell-legacy-product.test.tsx
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of five core artifacts plus roadmap and status
separate Codex security authorization and legacy compatibility review
separate Codex design critic review before implementation
separate Codex product-design-authority review of 390px 320px desktop runtime evidence
separate Codex Stage 3 Stage 6 and closeout reviews

out_of_scope: MEAL_LOG content sheets recent frequent picker and nutrition UI owned by #12
Legacy endpoint decoder or planner nutrition compatibility removal owned by #13
New bottom tab route public endpoint field status writer or data model
Product planning add edit shopping cooking leftovers XP or current-version repin
Automatic migration of legacy product planner rows into meal logs
Weekly nutrition aggregate card goals analysis or medical advice
Unmerged remote migration production write or capability activation
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned. Approval stays not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/authorization/legacy, five-axis and design reviews reach zero findings. Stage 1 current commands are docs validators/tests/lint/typecheck/audit/diff; component/E2E/visual/a11y/browser/remote evidence is future. Implementation waits for #9 runtime. #10 owns the existing Planner shell and PLANNER_WEEK plan-only composition, #12 owns MEAL_LOG UI, #13 owns compatibility tombstones.
